title: mutter bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[47.5-13]
- Fix path to gdctl when running installed test

[47.5-12]
- Backport gdctl utility

[47.5-11]
- Fix polyinstantiation preventing Xwayland to start

[47.5-10]
- Backport 'Fix race hotplug race conditions in DRM lease manager'

[47.5-9]
- Backport the pre-configure mechanism
full_text:
[47.5-13]
- Fix path to gdctl when running installed test

[47.5-12]
- Backport gdctl utility

[47.5-11]
- Fix polyinstantiation preventing Xwayland to start

[47.5-10]
- Backport 'Fix race hotplug race conditions in DRM lease manager'

[47.5-9]
- Backport the pre-configure mechanism

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20278-0.html
